sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 66

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 66:1
items.html:
(to the question) The measure of the Tifferet
The measure of the Tifferet is four covenants, for ZA [Zeir Anpin] has no completeness with less than that. For as long as he has no Mochin of Chaya, he is discerned as lacking, and is not fit to beget. And this is the secret of "the measure of the Guf is four covenants" — meaning that he should have four levels, which are extended to him in the secret of the four Yesodot, as above in Answer 65. (There)
